## Type

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `ui` — UI / styling only
- [ ] `refactor` — Code refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] `perf` — Performance improvement
- [ ] `chore` — Dependency / config update
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
